answers.answer: C) It depends - average improved but tail latency nearly doubled. 80% faster (10ms) but 20% nearly 2x slower (950ms vs 500ms). For SLA/SLO, p99 matters more than average. Better metrics: p50, p95, p99.

YES SERIOUS PROBLEM. p99 14x baseline, DB CPU 94%, connections 97%, memory 98.2%, cache hit 42% vs 95%. ROOT CAUSE: Dropped mv_daily_stats materialized view - queries now miss cache and overload DB. DO NOW: Rollback migration, recreate MV. WAIT: Error rate investigation, post-mortem.
